items.title: Messi rolls back the clock for Argentina to start ...
items.summary: It wasn't entirely clear if Lionel Messi would play this summer. But his hat trick showed how ready he is.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Musetti withdraws from Wimbledon with injury
items.summary: Lorenzo Musetti has pulled out of Wimbledon as he recovers from a left thigh injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
